---
title: "Dr. Mellissa Linton-Villafranco"

about:
  template: jolla
  image: images/portrait_1.jpg
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Arizona State University
      href: https://www.asu.edu
---

**Scholar • Researcher • Educator**

Dr. Mellissa Linton-Villafranco is a scholar, researcher, and educator whose work examines criminal justice, public policy, and interdisciplinary approaches to improving communities.

Her research bridges rigorous scholarship with public impact through data-driven inquiry, teaching, and collaborative partnerships.
